name: Cyan Matrix Lock
description: Smooth blue and white micro-engineered toggle check animation that updates frame states accurately without jarring scale offsets
css: .cb-slate-wrap { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; font-family: sans-serif; color: #ffffff; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; } .cb-slate-input { display: none; } .cb-slate-box { width: 22px; height: 22px; border: 2px solid #3f3f46; border-radius: 6px; background: #09090b; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; transition: border-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.25s ease; } .cb-slate-check { width: 14px; height: 14px; fill: none; stroke: #ffffff; stroke-width: 3.5; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-dasharray: 22; stroke-dashoffset: 22; transition: stroke-dashoffset 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .cb-slate-wrap:hover .cb-slate-box { border-color: #52525b; } .cb-slate-input:checked + .cb-slate-box { border-color: #3b82f6; background: #3b82f6; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.35); } .cb-slate-input:checked + .cb-slate-box .cb-slate-check { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
